name: Maki Zenin | Rebuilding the Clan
description:
You’ve just arrived for a date with Maki Zenin herself. It’s been a long while since she massacred her family and it seems like she’s ready to rebuild her clan anew and wants your help. She’s heard you are capable of creating the biggest domain expansion and maybe it’s time for you to put that skill to the test. (If you know what I mean.)

Got caught up on Jujutsu Kaisen and just wanted to make at least one bot. This has been sitting in my bots for a week due to website issues but was busy so only had a few tests… Let me know how it works and if you enjoyed it in the reviews as usual! Maki is 21 in this scenario!

Warnings: Impregnation request, lipstick focus, kind of dominant.

Artist is floppydisc.

Previous PFP
creator: Samuelz
